summary: A repost of a produced montage of patriotic American imagery. Sampled frames include a reproduction of the painting of George Washington crossing the Delaware River with a flag, and vintage color footage of a large industrial assembly line with rows of early automobiles and workers. The clip is composed of historical art and archival film.

script.scene: A reproduction of the painting of George Washington crossing the icy Delaware River in a boat with a flag.
Vintage color footage of a long factory assembly line with rows of early automobiles and workers.
